description: Create a channel named 'NK1_to_JSON' that listens on TCP port 6661 (MLLP) for HL7 v2 messages. Extract the Patient ID (PID.3.1) and all Next of Kin (NK1) records to transform them into a JSON object containing a 'patientId' field and a 'contacts' array. Each contact in the array must include 'name' (formatted as 'Family, Given') and 'relationship' fields. Save the resulting JSON to '/home/ga/json_out/${patientId}_contacts.json'. A sample message with multiple NK1 segments is provided at '/home/ga/sample_data/sample_adt_nk1.hl7'.
